records.question: Which physicians lead the Surgery department and have certifications that started on or after 2008-01-01 and expire exactly on 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE trained_in.certificationexpires = '2008-12-31' AND department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
WHERE p.EmployeeID IN (
  SELECT d.Head
  FROM Department d
  WHERE d.Name = 'Surgery'
)
AND p.EmployeeID IN (
  SELECT t.Physician
  FROM Trained_In t
  WHERE t.CertificationDate >= '2008-01-01'
  AND t.CertificationExpires = '2008-12-31'
)

records.question: Which physicians lead the Surgery department and were certified on or before 2008-01-01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE trained_in.certificationdate <= '2008-01-01' AND department.name = 'Surgery'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
WHERE p.EmployeeID IN (
  SELECT Head FROM Department WHERE Name = 'Surgery'
)
AND p.EmployeeID IN (
  SELECT Physician FROM Trained_In WHERE CertificationDate <= '2008-01-01'
)

records.question: Which attending physicians named Elliot Reid with a social security number of at least 222222222 had appointments with registered nurse Carla Espinosa in examination room B on or before 2008-04-24 11:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN appointment ON physician.employeeid = appointment.physician
JOIN nurse ON appointment.prepnurse = nurse.employeeid
WHERE appointment.end <= '2008-04-24 11:00' AND physician.position = 'Attending Physician' AND nurse.name = 'Carla Espinosa' AND appointment.examinationroom = 'B' AND nurse.registered = 1 AND physician.ssn >= 222222222 AND physician.name = 'Elliot Reid'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
JOIN Appointment a ON p.EmployeeID = a.Physician
JOIN Nurse n ON a.PrepNurse = n.EmployeeID
WHERE p.Name = 'Elliot Reid'
AND p.SSN >= 222222222
AND n.Name = 'Carla Espinosa'
AND n.Registered = 1
AND a.ExaminationRoom = 'B'
AND a.Start <= '2008-04-24 11:00'

records.question: Which physicians named John Dorian with SSN 111111111 and position Staff Internist have patients named John Smith who live at 42 Foobar Lane, have phone 555-0256, and have an insurance ID at least 68476213?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN patient ON physician.employeeid = patient.pcp
WHERE patient.insuranceid >= 68476213 AND physician.ssn = 111111111 AND patient.name = 'John Smith' AND physician.name = 'John Dorian' AND patient.address = '42 Foobar Lane' AND physician.position = 'Staff Internist' AND patient.phone = '555-0256'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
JOIN Affiliated_With aw ON p.EmployeeID = aw.Physician
JOIN Patient pat ON p.EmployeeID = pat.PCP
WHERE p.Name = 'John Dorian'
AND p.SSN = 111111111
AND p.Position = 'Staff Internist'
AND pat.Name = 'John Smith'
AND pat.Address = '42 Foobar Lane'
AND pat.Phone = '555-0256'
AND pat.InsuranceID >= 68476213

records.question: Which Surgical Attending Physician named John Wen with SSN 777777777 heads the Surgery department and has training certifications dated at least 2008-01-01 that expire no earlier than 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician' AND physician.ssn = 777777777 AND physician.name = 'John Wen' AND department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01' AND trained_in.certificationexpires >= '2008-12-31'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
WHERE p.Name = 'John Wen'
  AND p.SSN = 777777777
  AND p.Position = 'Surgical Attending Physician'
  AND p.EmployeeID IN (
    SELECT d.Head
    FROM Department d
    WHERE d.Name = 'Surgery'
  )
  AND p.EmployeeID IN (
    SELECT t.Physician
    FROM Trained_In t
    WHERE t.CertificationDate >= '2008-01-01'
      AND t.CertificationExpires >= '2008-12-31'
  )

records.question: Can you tell me about Keith Dudemeister who works as an MD Resident and has an SSN of at least 888888888?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
WHERE physician.position = 'MD Resident' AND physician.ssn >= 888888888 AND physician.name = 'Keith Dudemeister'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Physician.EmployeeID
FROM Physician
WHERE Physician.Name = 'Keith Dudemeister'
  AND Physician.Position = 'MD Resident'
  AND Physician.SSN >= 888888888
